About Us

Koduri Mosibabu
Sri Matlapalem Mahalakshmi
Building Material Supplier's

కోడూరి మోసిబాబు — కుటుంబ వ్యాపారం, విశ్వసనీయ సేవ

A trusted family business serving the construction community of Kakinada and Matlapalem region for over two decades. We supply quality sand, gravel, and construction materials with prompt delivery and honest pricing.

🏗️

Family Business Heritage

Koduri Mosibabu — generations of trust in every delivery.

🤝

విశ్వసనీయ సేవ — Trusted Service

Consistent quality and fair pricing for every client, big or small.

🚛

వేగవంతమైన డెలివరీ — Fast Delivery

Same-day or next-day delivery across Kakinada district.

Our Products

Construction Materials

Premium quality materials sourced and supplied for all your construction needs.

River Sand
ఇసుక

Fine-grade river sand ideal for plastering, brick laying, and concrete mixing. Clean and well-graded.

Available Now
Gravel
కంకర

Washed gravel for foundations, drainage, and path laying. Multiple grades available for different uses.

Bulk Available
20MM Metal
20 మి.మీ. మెటల్

Crushed stone 20mm aggregate for concrete structures, slabs, and RCC work. High strength and durability.

Top Seller
30MM Metal
30 మి.మీ. మెటల్

Coarse 30mm crushed aggregate for heavy-duty foundations and large concrete pours.

Heavy Duty
Wet Mix
వెట్ మిక్స్

Pre-mixed aggregate blend for road sub-base, floor base, and pathways. Ready for compaction.

Road Grade

Quality Assurance

నాణ్యమైన సామగ్రి
Guaranteed Quality

Every material we supply meets the standards required for durable, safe construction in the region.

✅
Sourced from Certified QuarriesAll aggregates sourced from licensed and inspected quarries in AP region.
🧪
Proper Gradation & SizingMaterials are sieved and graded to exact specifications for consistent quality.
💧
Washed & Clean AggregatesSand and gravel are washed to remove clay, silt, and impurities before delivery.
📏
Accurate MeasurementsEvery load is measured accurately — you get exactly what you order, every time.
🚛
Fresh Stock, Regular SupplyWe maintain fresh stock rotations so material quality is never compromised.

Our Services

What We Offer

🚛
Material Deliveryడెలివరీ సేవ

Same-day and next-day delivery to your construction site anywhere in Kakinada district. We bring the materials right to your doorstep.

📦
Bulk Ordersపెద్ద ఆర్డర్లు

Special pricing and dedicated supply schedule for contractors and builders with high-volume requirements. Call for bulk quotes.

🏗️
Construction Supportనిర్మాణ సహాయం

Expert advice on material selection for your specific project needs. We help you choose the right material and quantity.
